professional_summary: Financial analyst and FP&A professional with 5 years of experience in corporate finance, financial modeling, and investment analysis at Fortune 500 companies and growth-stage startups. Expert in DCF valuation, budgeting, and forecasting with advanced Excel and SQL skills. Proven ability to deliver financial insights that drive strategic decision-making.

work_experience.title: Senior Financial Analyst – FP&A
bullets: Built 3-statement financial models and DCF valuation models for $50M+ M&A due diligence transactions
Led annual budgeting and quarterly forecasting process for $200M P&L, improving forecast accuracy by 18%
Performed variance analysis on monthly actuals vs. budget, presenting findings to CFO and executive team
Developed Tableau dashboards and Excel-based FP&A reporting tools used by 25+ finance team members
Streamlined financial reporting process using SQL queries and Python automation, saving 15 hours per month

work_experience.title: Financial Analyst
bullets: Supported LBO and leveraged buyout financial modeling for private equity transactions totaling $800M
Prepared investment analysis presentations using Bloomberg and Capital IQ for senior management review
Maintained and updated complex financial models in Excel with VBA macros for scenario analysis
Assisted in preparation of quarterly board materials including financial forecasting and treasury reporting

work_experience.title: Associate Financial Analyst
bullets: Conducted financial analysis and valuation for 8 portfolio companies using DCF and comparable company analysis
Built GAAP-compliant financial statements in Excel for audit preparation, achieving zero restatements
Performed market research and competitive benchmarking using FactSet and Bloomberg Terminal
Supported accounting team with month-end close procedures and IFRS financial statement preparation

projects.name: FinancialModels.io
projects.description: Free library of Excel-based DCF, LBO, and M&A financial models downloaded 8,000+ times
